submitted_payload.title: Ralph Workflow
submitted_payload.description: Free and open-source operating system for autonomous coding: a composable loop framework and AI orchestrator for developers who want a strong default workflow, reviewable handoffs, and explicit verification instead of another chat-only coding session.
submitted_payload.author: RalphWorkflow

verification.execution_method: Direct JSON POST to Claudetory's public /api/submit-resource endpoint discovered from the live submit page bundle.

why_this_action: The current audit still shows distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck while same-family curator outreach is paused.
Claudetory is a high-intent Claude Code directory, which is a better fit than another broad low-intent listing and keeps the audience close to Ralph Workflow's strongest pain framing.
It was not yet present in outreach-log.md, so this expands distribution instead of duplicating a live lane.
The submission preserves Codeberg as the primary destination and keeps GitHub as mirror-only context.
expected_outcome: Qualified Claude Code and workflow evaluators discover Ralph Workflow through a fresh high-intent directory lane that points directly to the primary Codeberg repo.
replacement_condition: If there is no live Claudetory listing or referral evidence by 2026-06-07, treat this as pending-only and move the next fresh-action slot to a different executable high-intent lane instead of another same-family directory burst.
